notes: A rule of replacement permits swapping a subformula for a logical equivalent (def:logical-equivalence) inside a context (def:formula-context). The edge to thm:replacement-of-logical-equivalents is a well-definedness/soundness justification (Rule 4 exception) -- the rule is permitted BECAUSE that theorem holds. 'subformula' is transitive via def:formula-context (whose placeholder occupies a subformula position).
